verses.text: Mite in bangbang a geel zongin Topa' deihna bang bekin a piang ding hizaw hi
Mihingte pen a gamtatna uhah man kisa a, ahi zongin Topa in a khenna khat na om hi
Na geelnate khempeuh Topa ap in; tua hi leh na geelna bangin tangtung ding hi
Topa in na khempeuh ngimna nei-in bawl a, migilote nangawn siatna a thuak dingin a bawl ahi hi
Topa in a kihisak mite mudah a, amaute in gimna thuak hamtang uh hi
Thumanna leh cihtakna mawhmai ngahna hi a, Topa zahtakna siatna tawh kipelhna ahi hi
Topa' deih bangin gamtatna pen galte nangawn lawma kaihzawhna ahi hi
Thuman loin hauhna sangin thumanin tawmno neihna a hoihzaw ahi hi
Mihing in thu geel a, ahi zongin Topa' deihna bangin kisemkhia hi
Kumpipa in thuman genin thu a khen ciangin khial ngeilo hi
A man tawikhaina leh tawi tehnate Topa-a' hi a, a tawisuang khempeuh ama bawlsa ahi hi
Thumanin gamtatna bek in kumpi kipsak ahih manin a sia-a gamtat ding kumpite utlo uh hi
Kumpite in thuman genna deih uh a, thuman a gen mite it uh hi
Kumpipa heh leh mi khatpeuh in sihlawh thei a, mipil khat in kumpipa lungdamsak thei hi
Kumpipa maitai leh nuntakna hi a, ama pahtakna pen tuk hunin guah a zusak meiipi tawh kibang hi
Kham sangin pilna hoihzaw a, ngun sangin thutheihna deihhuai zaw hi
Mihoihte in siatna tawh a kipelh ding lampi tawn uh a, a lampi tot ding limtakin a ngaihsun mi in a nuntakna a hu ahi hi
Kisaktheihna in siatna hong tuaksak a, kiphatsakna in pukna hong piangsak hi
Mi kihisak tawh kipawlin vankisutte ngahna sangin mizawngte tawh kikhawlin mineu-a om hoihzaw hi
Thuhilhna a mang mite a ma vang ding a, Topa a muang mite a lung dam ding hi
Lungsim pilte thumuhna tawh kampau uh a, amau' kam khumna zaknophuai kisa semsem hi
Pilna pen mipilte-a' dingin hin'na tuinak bang hi a, mihaite ahih leh amau' haina mah in gimna thuaksak hi
Mipilte in thu ngaihsun kawmin kam pau uh a, amau' pauna zaknophuai semsem hi
Kam khum pen khuaizu bang hi a, i kamah khum a, i pumpi-a' dingin zong hoih mahmah hi
Hoih hi, ci-in i ngaihsut thu khat pen sih theihna ding thu na hi zawsop thei hi
An duhna in mi na semsak a, gilkialna in nak sepsak semsem zaw hi
Migilote in siatna ding bek zongzong uh a, a kampaunate uh na a kangtumthei meikuang tawh kibang hi
Mihoihlote in kitotna piangsak a, mi gensiate in lawmta ki-it kimlai kimudahsak hi
A ngongtat mite in a lawmte zol a, lungkhamna sung tun'pih hi
A mit hong sitsante thusia a ngaihsun hi a, a neh hong piksante thusia geel ahi hi
A teekte' sam kang minthan'na lukhu hi a, thumanin nuntakna tawh a ngah ahi hi
Thahatna sangin lungduaina hoihzaw a, khuapi khat ukzawhna sangin eimah ki-ukzawhna hoihzaw hi
Mite in bangbangin ai a san zongin, a piang ding thu pen Topa' deihna bangbek hizaw hi.
